name: RNESemiCircularGauge
description: Semi-circular gauge chart with color-coded segments, customizable tick marks, and modern design

min.name: min
min.description: Minimum value of the gauge scale. Example: 0

max.name: max
max.description: Maximum value of the gauge scale. Example: 100

width.name: width
width.description: Width of the chart in pixels. Example: 400

height.name: height
height.description: Height of the chart in pixels. Example: 250

theme.name: theme
theme.description: Partial theme override for customizing chart appearance. Example: {series: [{color: '#3b82f6'}]}

colors.name: colors
colors.description: Theme series colors (fallback when axis segment colors are not set). Example: ['#3b82f6', '#10b981']

axisBgColor.name: axisBgColor
axisBgColor.description: Background track color behind the colored segments on the backing gauge layer. Default: 'transparent'

axisWidth.name: axisWidth
axisWidth.description: Thickness of the colored gauge arc in pixels. Default: 30

tickColor.name: tickColor
tickColor.description: Color for tick marks and major split lines. Falls back to theme when omitted.

axisColors.name: axisColors
axisColors.description: Colors for each arc segment (left to right). Example: ['#e74c3c', '#3498db', '#2ecc71']. When omitted, theme series colors are used.

axisColorLengths.name: axisColorLengths
axisColorLengths.description: Numeric endpoints for each segment (same length as axisColors). Example: [40, 80, 120] for ranges 0–40, 40–80, 80–120. When omitted, the scale is divided evenly.
